summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MapTDP's JWT authentication system, PWA features, and favicon implementation. All backend API endpoints passed tests with 100% success rate. Frontend authentication flows work perfectly with proper error handling and route protection.

integration_issues.issue: Service worker registration may not be immediately visible/active on first load despite console logs showing successful cache setup
integration_issues.impact: PWA offline functionality might need page refresh to be fully active

integration_issues.issue: React console warning: 'Can't perform a React state update on an unmounted component' appears after successful registration
integration_issues.impact: Memory leak warning but no functional impact

passed_tests: All backend API endpoints working: /api/healthz, /api/auth/register, /api/auth/login, /api/auth/me
JWT token generation and validation working correctly
User registration creates account and returns token + user data
User login authenticates existing users successfully
Password validation rejects wrong passwords with 401 status
Duplicate email registration properly rejected with 400 status
Auth page loads with dark glassmorphism styling (#050505 background)
Login/Register tabs functional with proper form switching
Registration flow: username field appears on 'Inscription' tab
Login flow: test@maptdp.fr / test123 authentication successful
After login: header shows username on left, logout button on right
Logout button functional - returns user to auth page
Auth error handling: wrong password shows 'Email ou mot de passe incorrect' message
Protected routes working: home page redirects to auth when not authenticated
Favicon.png exists and loads correctly from /favicon.png
Manifest.json exists with proper PWA config (short_name, icons, start_url, display:standalone)
Service-worker.js exists and console shows successful cache registration

All required data-testid attributes present: auth-card, auth-email-input, auth-password-input, auth-submit-button, auth-tab-login, auth-tab-register, auth-username-input, logout-button, user-display-name
Page title correctly set to 'MapTDP'
Theme color properly configured to #050505
PWA installability requirements met (manifest + service worker)
TDP search proxy endpoints functional (returns empty arrays when Express backend unavailable as expected)
